channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Budget session set to begin June 7

Matched titles:
- Budget session begins on 7 June
- Bangladesh parliament’s budget session to begin June 7
- JS to begin 2nd budget session on 7 June

- Budget session of parliament to be held on Jun 7
- Budget session of parliament to be held on Jun 7
- JS to go into budget session on June 7
- 1st budget session of 13th parliament begins 7 June
